item.title: TA 2025/1 - R&D Tax Incentive: Revised expenditure thresholds
item.description: The ATO has revised the R&D expenditure thresholds for the 2025 income year. Companies with aggregated turnover below $20 million will now receive a 43.5% refundable tax offset.

item.title: TA 2025/2 - GST: Digital supply changes
item.description: Changes to GST for digital supplies from 1 July 2025.
